channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: Kenya's Economy Reaches Record Value Amid Sectoral Shifts
item.dc:creator: Grace Mkamburi
item.description: Record KSh 17.58 Trillion GDP Signals Kenya's Economic Transformation Kenya's economy achieved a nominal value of KSh 17.58 trillion in 2025, a record high according to the Economic Survey 2026. Significant shifts are evident, with agriculture strengthening...
item.content:encoded: Record KSh 17.58 Trillion GDP Signals Kenya's Economic Transformation Kenya's economy achieved a nominal value of KSh 17.58 trillion in 2025, a record high according to the Economic Survey 2026. Significant shifts are evident, with agriculture strengthening...

item.title: Mainoo Snatches Champions League Spot for Man Utd in Five-Goal Thriller Against Liverpool
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Mainoo secures Man Utd's Champions League spot with a winner in a 5-goal thriller against Liverpool. Catch all the highlights from Old Trafford.
item.content:encoded: Mainoo secures Man Utd's Champions League spot with a winner in a 5-goal thriller against Liverpool. Catch all the highlights from Old Trafford.

item.title: Larry Madowo and Edith Kimani: Public Appearances Fuel Relationship Speculation in Kenya
item.dc:creator: Zed Mogaka
item.description: Widespread speculation has ignited across Kenya regarding a rumored romantic relationship between prominent journalists Larry Madowo and Edith Kimani, fueled by their public appearances. Public discourse is actively discussing a potential romance for the media...

item.title: How Marurui Squatters Protest Paralyzed Nairobi's Northern Bypass
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Marurui squatters protest land grabbing along Nairobi's Northern Bypass, paralyzing transport. Over 6,000 residents are affected by this crucial land dispu

item.title: Billy Magnussen stars in AMC's new Silicon Valley satire 'The Audacity'

item.description: Billy Magnussen Serves Up Silicon Valley's Naked Truth in 'The Audacity' Billy Magnussen strips down for AMC's new dramedy, 'The Audacity,' offering a sharp, witty take on Silicon Valley's flawed visionaries and wannabes. Premiering April 12, 2026, the series...

item.title: Shocking Kang'ata UDA Exit After President's Visit
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Kang'ata's UDA Exit Reshapes Murang'a Politics Murang'a Governor Irungu Kang'ata declared today he will not seek re-election on a United Democratic Alliance (UDA) ticket in 2027. This decision follows internal party pressure, differing strategic views, and a...

item.title: The Scramble for Starlight: Kenyan Representation I'm A Celebrity UK
item.dc:creator: The Chronicler
item.description: A grand stage in the southern sun, yet the local stars remain unseen. The echoes of old partitions resonate, leaving popular Kenyan figures in shadow.
item.content:encoded: A grand stage in the southern sun, yet the local stars remain unseen. The echoes of old partitions resonate, leaving popular Kenyan figures in shadow.

item.title: 10 Kenya Flood Deaths Confirmed as Heavy Rains Persist
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Police confirm 10 Kenya flood deaths as heavy rains cause landslides and bridge damage in Eastern and Coast regions. Get the full details here.
item.content:encoded: Police confirm 10 Kenya flood deaths as heavy rains cause landslides and bridge damage in Eastern and Coast regions. Get the full details here.

item.title: Isaac Mwaura Orders Garissa and Tana River Flood Evacuation

item.title: Uhuru Kenyatta: Why I Will Not Quit Active Kenyan Politics

item.title: 5 Easy Steps to Report Bolt Ride Issues Fast
